MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
John Won, Esq. of Haapala, Thompson & Abern, 510-763-2324 for defendants and moving parties Dennis and Barbara Plaut, Spencer Plaut
Court Call Appearance: Ray Ryan, Esq. of San Diego Injury Law Center, 619-338-8230 for plaintiff and opposing party Mikhail Pakomov

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT DENNIS PLAUT, BARBARA PLAUT, PLAUT, SPENCER'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS MOOT AS TO DENNIS AND BARBARA PLAUT. DENIED AS TO SPENCER PLAUT. THERE REMAINS A FACTUAL ISSUE WHETHER DEFENDANT EXERCISED REASONABLE CARE IN CONTROLLING HIS SPEED, MAINTAINING A SAFE DISTANCE, AND KEEPING A SUFFICIENT LOOK OUT. Prevailing party to submit form of order that complies with CCP 437(c)g. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
